evals.description: Triggers on game sound design request
evals.prompt: I need to set up a sound system for my 2D platformer game. Where do I start?
How do I make my game's music change dynamically when the player enters combat?

evals.description: Triggers on spatial audio setup request
evals.prompt: I want enemies to sound like they're coming from the correct direction in my FPS game

evals.description: Can implement FMOD event system in Unity
evals.prompt: Show me how to set up FMOD in Unity and play a sound effect when the player jumps

evals.description: Can design a bus hierarchy for mixing
evals.prompt: How should I organize my audio buses for a game with music, SFX, dialogue, and UI sounds?
My footstep sounds are annoying because they sound exactly the same every time. How do I fix this?
How do I make sounds get muffled when they are behind a wall in my 3D game?

evals.description: Can advise on FMOD vs Wwise selection
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new game project. Should I use FMOD or Wwise for audio?
My game is using 300MB of audio memory and loading takes forever. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Warns against hardcoding audio file paths
evals.prompt: In my game I'm calling AudioSource.PlayClipAtPoint with direct references to wav files. Is this fine?

evals.description: Does not invent audio middleware that does not exist
evals.prompt: How do I set up the AudioForge Pro middleware for my Unity game?

evals.description: Can implement Wwise integration with switches
evals.prompt: How do I use Wwise switch containers to change footstep sounds based on surface material?

evals.description: References spatial audio guide for HRTF detail
evals.prompt: Explain HRTF-based binaural audio rendering for my VR game in full technical detail

evals.description: Does not trigger for non-game audio production
evals.prompt: How do I master a podcast episode for Spotify distribution?
